title: FAMILIES CONNECTED/FAMILIAS EN CONEXION - 211info
text: ARC LANE COUNTY FAMILIES CONNECTED/FAMILIAS EN CONEXION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support to parents who are raising a child with an intellectual and/or developmental disability and plan for a positive future. Helps families build community connections and connects families to events, information, and resources. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Familes with children 0-21 with intellectual or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, some events occur on the weekends Email (541) 343-5256 124 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-5256 ext 124 Nancy Berge [email protected] Español (541) 343-5256 ext 124 Program Coordinator Liliana Arciga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Services: Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Parenting Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Health/Disability Related Social Clubs Health/Disability Related Social Clubs * Hispanic/Latino Community Health/Disability Related Support Groups Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Parent to Parent Networking Parent to Parent Networking * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYABILITY PROGRAM FOOD - CARES FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY CONNECTORS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STEPPING OUT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ESTEAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC LANE COUNTY
